_meta.description: Comprehensive feature list for incremental implementation. Each feature should be implementable and testable in a single Claude Code session. CRITICAL: It is unacceptable to remove or edit tests because this could lead to missing or buggy functionality. Only mark a feature as passes=true after its tests pass.

features.description: Project scaffolding: create directory structure, __init__.py files, .gitignore
steps: Create scripts/, prompts/, tests/, tests/fixtures/, output/ directories
Create __init__.py in scripts/ and tests/
Create .gitignore with Python, .venv, output/, *.pdf, .env entries
Create output/.gitkeep
Verify: ls confirms all directories exist

features.description: Move v0.16_alpha prompt files into prompts/ directory
steps: Copy coordinator.md to prompts/coordinator.md
Copy phase1-3 files to prompts/
Copy references/ directory to prompts/references/
Verify: all 8 prompt files exist in prompts/

features.description: config.py: Token management with env var loading and stock code validation
steps: Create scripts/config.py with get_token() and validate_stock_code()
Support A-share (XXXXXX.SH/.SZ) and HK (XXXXX.HK) formats
Write test_config.py: test token loading, test stock code validation
Run pytest tests/test_config.py -- all pass

features.description: requirements.txt and init.sh setup script
steps: Create scripts/requirements.txt with tushare, pandas, pdfplumber, requests, pytest
Create init.sh with venv setup, pip install, token check, test run
chmod +x init.sh
Run bash init.sh -- completes without errors

features.description: CLI argument parser for tushare_collector.py (skeleton)
steps: Create scripts/tushare_collector.py with argparse skeleton
Arguments: --code (required), --token, --output, --extra-fields, --dry-run
Run with --dry-run -- prints parsed args correctly
Run with no args -- shows help with error

features.description: CLI argument parser for pdf_preprocessor.py (skeleton)
steps: Create scripts/pdf_preprocessor.py with argparse skeleton
Arguments: --pdf (required), --output, --verbose, --dry-run
Run with --dry-run -- prints args correctly

features.description: Test fixtures: create mock Tushare API response files
steps: Create tests/fixtures/mock_tushare_responses/ directory
Create mock JSON files: stock_basic, daily_basic, income, balancesheet, cashflow, dividend, weekly for 600887
Create conftest.py with fixture that loads mock data by endpoint name
Verify: pytest --collect-only shows fixtures

features.description: Markdown output utility: format_number(), format_table(), format_header()
steps: Create helper functions for markdown output formatting
format_number(): divide by 1e6, format with commas to 2 decimals
format_table(): generate markdown table with right-alignment for numbers
Write tests: test format_number(96886000000) == '96,886.00'
Run pytest -- all format tests pass

features.description: Check if PDF already exists locally before download
steps: Add check_local_pdf(stock_code, year, search_dir) function
Search patterns: {code}_{year}_*.pdf, *{code}*{year}*年报*.pdf
Write test: create temp file matching pattern, verify detection
Write test: verify returns None when no match

features.description: Document snowball-report-downloader invocation in coordinator prompt
steps: Update prompts/coordinator.md Phase 0 section with download command syntax
Add fallback instruction: if download fails, set pdf_available=false
Verify: coordinator.md contains Phase 0 block

features.description: PDF validation after download (magic bytes, size check)
steps: Add validate_pdf(filepath) function to config.py
Check %PDF magic bytes and file size > 100KB
Write tests with fake PDF header and empty file
Run pytest -- all pass

features.description: Update coordinator to handle 3 PDF scenarios (exists/download/skip)
steps: Update prompts/coordinator.md with decision tree
Scenario 1: User uploaded PDF -> use directly
Scenario 2: Auto-download -> validate -> use
Scenario 3: Download failed -> set no-PDF mode
Add AskUserQuestion template for PDF choice

features.description: TushareClient class: initialize connection with token and rate limiting
steps: Add TushareClient class to tushare_collector.py
Constructor: set tushare token, create pro_api()
Add rate_limit decorator: time.sleep(0.3) between calls
Add _safe_call() with retry logic (max 3 retries)
Write test with mock: verify rate limiting and retry

features.description: Section 1: Basic company info (stock_basic + daily_basic endpoints)
steps: Add get_basic_info(ts_code) method
Extract name, industry, exchange, list_date, pe_ttm, pb, total_mv, circ_mv
Format as section 1 markdown table
Write test with mock data: verify correct field extraction

features.description: Section 2: Market data (current price, 52-week range)
steps: Add get_market_data(ts_code) method
Get latest close price and calculate 52-week high/low
Format as section 2 markdown
Write test: verify 52-week range calculation

features.description: Section 3: Five-year consolidated income statement (report_type=1)
steps: Add get_income(ts_code, report_type=1) method
Fetch 5 years of annual income data
Extract: revenue, oper_cost, n_income_attr_p, minority_gain, dt_eps
All amounts / 1e6, formatted with commas
Write test: verify amount conversion and 5-year column ordering

features.description: Section 3P: Five-year parent-company income statement (report_type=4)
steps: Add get_income_parent(ts_code) using report_type=4
Extract parent-only fields: revenue, n_income, oper_profit
Format as section 3P markdown
Write test: verify report_type=4 is passed to API

features.description: Section 4: Five-year consolidated balance sheet (report_type=1)
steps: Add get_balance_sheet(ts_code, report_type=1) method
Extract: total_assets, total_liab, money_cap, accounts_receiv, inventories, goodwill, contract_liab, adv_receipts, lt_borr, st_borr
Amounts / 1e6
Write test: verify interest-bearing debt and contract_liab fields

features.description: Section 4P: Five-year parent-company balance sheet (report_type=4)
steps: Add get_balance_sheet_parent(ts_code) using report_type=4
Extract: money_cap, lt_eqt_invest, st_borr, lt_borr
Format as section 4P markdown
Write test: verify parent-specific fields

features.description: Section 5: Five-year cash flow statement
steps: Add get_cashflow(ts_code) method
Extract: n_cashflow_act (OCF), n_cashflow_inv_act, n_cashflow_fnc_act, c_paid_invest (capex), prov_depr_assets (D&A)
Calculate FCF = OCF - |Capex|
Write test: verify FCF calculation

features.description: Section 6: Dividend history
steps: Add get_dividends(ts_code) method
Extract: cash_div_tax, stk_div, record_date, ex_date per year
Calculate total dividend = cash_div_tax * total_share
Write test: verify DPS extraction and total calculation

features.description: Section 11 + Appendix A: 10-year weekly price history
steps: Add get_weekly_prices(ts_code) method
Fetch 10 years of weekly OHLCV data
Calculate 10yr high/low with dates, annual summary
Format section 11 + Appendix A
Write test: verify 10-year range and annual aggregation

features.description: Section 12: Key financial indicators (fina_indicator endpoint)
steps: Add get_fina_indicators(ts_code) method
Extract: roe, grossprofit_margin, netprofit_margin, rd_exp_to_revenue
Format as section 12 markdown (5 years)
Write test: verify ROE and margin fields

features.description: Section 9: Business segment data (fina_mainbz_ts endpoint)
steps: Add get_segments(ts_code) method
Extract revenue and profit by segment
Handle empty data gracefully
Write test: verify segment breakdown

features.description: Section 7 (partial): Top 10 holders + audit info
steps: Add get_holders(ts_code) and get_audit(ts_code) methods
Extract top 10 shareholder names and percentages
Extract audit opinion type
Write tests for holder and audit parsing

features.description: available_fields.json: Generate field inventory from all endpoints
steps: After calling each endpoint, capture all column names
Write to available_fields.json: {endpoint: [fields]}
Write test: verify JSON structure

features.description: Extra-fields mode: --extra-fields for on-demand field fetching
steps: Parse 'endpoint.field_name' format
Fetch specified fields and output to _extra.md
Write test: verify field parsing logic

features.description: Full data_pack_market.md assembly: combine all sections
steps: Add assemble_data_pack() combining all get_* methods
Write complete file with header (stock code, time, completeness)
Include all sections, leave placeholders for Agent-filled ones
Write test: verify all section headers present

features.description: yfinance fallback: degrade gracefully when Tushare endpoint fails
steps: Wrap each call in try/except
On failure, attempt yfinance equivalent
Tag fallback data with '来源: yfinance (降级)'
Write test: simulate failure, verify fallback triggers

features.description: Warnings generation: auto-detect anomalies during collection
steps: Add WarningsCollector class
Detect: data missing, >300% YoY change, audit risk, governance risk
Format as section 13 in data_pack_market.md
Write test: inject anomalous data, verify warning

features.description: Phase 1B prompt: role=数据采集专员, scope=§7/§8/§10/§13, references §1-§6 as tushare-generated, forbids analysis
